seoTitle: St Clair vs St Fillans — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Clair and St Fillans. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Clair vs St Fillans: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Clair and St Fillans.
heading: St Clair vs St Fillans — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Clair, New South Wales and St Fillans, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Fillans has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to St Clair (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Clair or St Fillans safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Clair has a flood risk score of 37/100, while St Fillans scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Clair scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. St Fillans scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Clair or St Fillans?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Fillans has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
